title: Women's Health Centers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Women's Health Centers 31 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Veterans No Filter Veterans No Filter LGBTQ2+ Individuals Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services and support for menstrual cycle, incontinence, fertility and infertility, prolapse, infections, and other women's health conditions. Also provides therapies, treatment and sugical services including hysterectomy and tubal ligation. 620 NW 11th Street Suite 106 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Women of all ages Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm (541) 667-3801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTEGRITY COASTAL HEALTH & WELLNESS INTEGRITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides specialty medical care and a full spectrum of gynecological services in an LGBTQIA2S+ safe and affirming space. 324 SW 7th Street Suite B Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the LGBTQIA2S+ community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 265-4253 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC BARNES ROAD OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wide range of obstetric and gynecological care. Services include prenatal care, midwifery and delivery services, family planning and birth control options (including tubal ligations). Offers HPV vaccinations, menopausal and infertility treatments. 11750 SW Barnes Road Suite 300 Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 416-9922 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides obstetric and gynecological services. Services include breast exams and mammograms, prenatal, childbirth, and postpartum care, lactation support, annual gynecological exams, STI/STD testing and treatment, contraceptives, tubal ligation services, and abortion services. For male sterilization (vasectomy), contact the Urology Clinic at 503-346-1500. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Women of any age Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEAVERTON HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams. Sexually transmitted disease testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, testing for UTI infections and HPV immunizations services available. Offers pregnancy testing and options counseling. Provides medication based abortion up to 11 weeks, surgical abortion not offered at this location. 12220 SW 1st Street Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 11am-7pm, Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday 8am-4pm Email (888) 875-7820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLANNED PARENTHOOD COLUMBIA WILLAMETTE BEND HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of free or low-cost sexual and reproductive health care service including birth control, emergency contraception, annual gynecological exams, colposcopy, LEEP procedures, and breast exams.
